title: [security] Potential key material leakage in oscore_ctx and EDHOC wipe paths
description: oscore_ctx_lookup copies keys to stack; edhoc.c wipe() calls and oscore_ctx_free() must guarantee no residual material (Monocypher crypto_wipe). Recent fixes (project-LICHEN-4b40) touch oscore.c but struct visibility and error paths in protect/unprotect not fully audited for Zephyr constrained mem (STM32WL). Schnorr48 and link key handling in link_ctx.c also at risk. See top risks from review.
